name: Financial Market Sentiment
description: Simulates how investors, analysts, media and retail traders react to a financial signal (earnings, policy, a rumour). Activity concentrates around market hours; channels model a fast news/price feed and a slower discussion forum.
prompt_framing: This is a financial-market sentiment simulation. Agents are retail traders, institutional analysts, financial journalists and commentators reacting to a market-moving signal. Model conviction levels, herding and contrarian behaviour, fear/greed dynamics, and how sentiment translates into buy/sell/hold positioning. Use bullish/bearish rather than supportive/opposing framing.
